shot_notes: The decision to leave the lion
evidence_summary: Execute the physical coordination of a multi-character carry mechanism to transition characters from a high-threat poppy field to safe ground, concluding with an emotional abandonment of a sleeping character.

Realizing they are immune, the Scarecrow and Tin Woodman work together to form a "human chair" to carry Dorothy and Toto out of the field. They manage to reach safety, but they are forced to make the heartbreaking decision to leave the Cowardly Lion behind...
Characters realizing immunity and beginning the physical lift.
Group reaches safe ground, looking back at the abandoned lion.
The group forms a human chair to carry Dorothy and Toto out of the poppy field.
